summary_zh: GPU加速查询引擎通常受限于内存和I/O带宽。NVIDIA的硬件进展——包括高带宽内存（HBM），以及NVIDIA的相关技术提升，正助力突破这些瓶颈。

title_zh: NVIDIA BioNeMo Agent工具包助力Claude Science中的生命科学研究
title_en: NVIDIA BioNeMo Agent Toolkit Brings Accelerated AI to Life Sciences Researchers in Claude Science
summary_zh: 生命科学进入了计算规模的新时代。十多年来，NVIDIA构建了完整的GPU加速计算堆栈，包括硬件、框架、库、模型、微服务和领域专用工具，帮助研究人员运行更复杂的工作流程并快速迭代。本周，Anthropic发布了Claude Science，这是一个面向科学的AI工作平台。
summary_en: Life sciences has reached an era of computational scale. For over a decade, NVIDIA has developed a full GPU-accelerated computing stack—covering hardware, frameworks, libraries, models, microservices, and domain-specific tools—to enable researchers to run sophisticated workflows and iterate faster. This week, Anthropic announced Claude Science, an AI workbench for science.
why_it_matters_zh: 该消息展示了NVIDIA在推动生命科学研究计算能力上的领先地位，以及Anthropic利用NVIDIA技术推出新型AI科研工具，助力科研人员提升效率与创新速度。
why_it_matters_en: This highlights NVIDIA's leadership in advancing computational capabilities in life sciences, and Anthropic's use of NVIDIA technology to deliver new AI tools that help researchers improve efficiency and accelerate innovation.

title_zh: NVIDIA推理软件栈助力实现最低每令牌成本
title_en: How NVIDIA’s Inference Software Stack Powers the Lowest Token Cost
summary_zh: 随着组织从AI试点迈向生产级AI工厂，基础设施决策已从关注芯片峰值规格转向关注每令牌成本，即每美元、每瓦特以及在必要延迟目标下能提供多少有用令牌。NVIDIA紧密协同其GPU、CPU、网络和系统共同设计，并通过强大的开源生态系统加持，其推理软件栈帮助实现了该目标。
summary_en: As organizations transition from AI pilots to production AI factories, infrastructure decisions have shifted from peak chip specs to cost per token—the number of useful tokens delivered per dollar, per watt, and within required latency. Codesigned with NVIDIA GPUs, CPUs, networking, and systems, and bolstered by a broad open source ecosystem, NVIDIA’s inference software stack powers these efficiency gains.
why_it_matters_zh: 在实际生产环境中，降低每令牌成本对提升AI应用的经济性和可扩展性至关重要。NVIDIA的协同设计和生态系统优势使其推理软件能够在成本和性能之间取得最佳平衡。
why_it_matters_en: Reducing cost per token is critical for economical and scalable AI deployments in production. NVIDIA’s codesigned hardware and software, along with its ecosystem, enable the inference stack to optimize the balance between cost and performance.

title_zh: 是什么驱动了反馈中的交互式提升？
title_en: What Drives Interactive Improvement from Feedback?
summary_zh: 本文研究了自然语言反馈在多轮语言代理设置中如何带来超过仅重复尝试的改进。通过在多个任务集和模型中引入受控的师生协议，比较外部反馈、自我反馈和无指导自我优化，结果表明多轮改进通常并不能证明有效反馈的作用。自生成反馈较无指导自我优化改进有限，而最强的外部教师带来显著反馈特定提升，说明有用反馈需提供超越简单重试的引导。学生使用反馈的能力比教师身份更决定交互收益，但教师选择对于固定学生仍很重要。研究建议评价基于反馈的代理时应与重复尝试基线对比，反馈的可用性不如反馈的可操作性关键。我们公开了受控的师生评估框架。
summary_en: This paper investigates when natural language feedback leads to improvements beyond mere repeated attempts in multi-turn language agent settings. Using a controlled student-teacher protocol across multiple benchmarks and models, it compares external feedback, self-feedback, and unguided self-refinement. Findings indicate that multi-turn improvements often do not evidence effective use of feedback, as self-generated feedback adds little beyond unguided self-refinement. The strongest external teachers yield significant feedback-specific gains, suggesting useful feedback must guide beyond generic retries. The student's ability to leverage feedback is a greater driver of gains than teacher identity, though teacher selection remains important. The study recommends evaluating feedback-based agents against repeated-attempt baselines and highlights that the ability to act on feedback, not just its availability, is central to interactive improvement. The controlled student-teacher evaluation framework is publicly released.
why_it_matters_zh: 该研究通过严格的实验设计区分了反馈带来的实际提升与其他因素引起的性能变化，为理解和衡量反馈在智能体学习中的作用提供了重要参考。指出了提升效果更多依赖学生对反馈的利用能力，而非仅反馈本身，强调了未来反馈机制设计和评价应关注交互能力，推动了反馈驱动学习领域的理论与实践发展。
why_it_matters_en: This study provides a rigorous evaluation that disentangles actual feedback-driven improvements from other factors influencing performance, offering key insights into the role of feedback in agent learning. It reveals that improvements depend more on the student's ability to utilize feedback than on the feedback alone, emphasizing the need to focus on interactive capabilities in future feedback design and evaluation. This advances both theoretical understanding and practical development in feedback-driven learning.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: What Drives Interactive Improvement from Feedback?. Category: coding_ai. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.
ranking_reason: Selected from authoritative primary source; quality score 84.

title_zh: 对比反思：迭代式提示优化方法
title_en: Contrastive Reflection for Iterative Prompt Optimization
summary_zh: 本文提出了一种用于智能信息检索代理的迭代提示优化框架——对比反思。该方法基于任务质量定义，利用问答代理和评分代理提供的结构化线索识别错误行为片段，结合成功示例，指导教师大型语言模型提出针对性的提示修改。仅当验证性能提升时接收修改，并可避免回退。在HotpotQA数据集上，该方法将准确率从51.4%提升至60.4%，优于仅使用失败示例或随机证据的方法。
summary_en: This paper introduces Contrastive Reflection, an iterative prompt optimization framework for agentic information retrieval workflows. It starts from task-centric quality definitions using QA and grading agents to expose structured traces, identifying error-anchored behavioral slices and successful nearby examples. A Teacher LLM proposes targeted prompt edits accepted only upon validation improvement. On HotpotQA, the method improves exact-match accuracy from 51.4% to 60.4%, outperforming failure-only and random-evidence variants.
why_it_matters_zh: 该工作创新性地结合了结构化行为线索和对比成功示例引导提示优化，提出了可解释且验证驱动的提示修复循环，提升了提示工程的实用性和效果，尤其适用于复杂信息检索代理的性能改进。
why_it_matters_en: This work innovatively combines structured behavioral traces with contrastive successful examples to guide prompt optimization, offering an interpretable, validation-driven repair loop. It enhances the practicality and effectiveness of prompt engineering, particularly for improving performance in complex information retrieval agents.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: Contrastive Reflection for Iterative Prompt Optimization. Category: coding_ai. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.
ranking_reason: Selected from authoritative primary source; quality score 71.

title_zh: 法律领域中的多智能体商议研究
summary_zh: 人工智能正越来越多地应用于法律领域，提升司法可及性。本文探讨了基于大型语言模型（LLMs）的多智能体商议方法在法律推理任务中的应用。我们提出两种受法庭程序和法律辩论启发的新型多智能体框架。实验表明，多智能体框架在法律和非法律基准测试中整体表现与单一大型模型相当，但产生了显著不同的答案，且在解决某些案例时表现优于基线模型。质性评估显示，多智能体方法更适合需要多角度批判性思维的问题。该研究表明，多智能体系统是法律AI领域的有前景方向。
summary_en: Artificial intelligence is increasingly applied in law to enhance access to justice. This paper investigates multi-agent deliberation methods using Large Language Models (LLMs) for legal reasoning tasks. Two novel multi-agent frameworks inspired by courtroom procedures and legal argumentation are introduced. Experiments on legal and non-legal benchmarks show that multi-agent frameworks perform comparably to baseline LLMs but produce notably different answers, successfully solving some cases where baselines fail. Qualitative evaluation highlights scenarios where multi-agent approaches excel, especially in answering questions requiring critical thinking from multiple perspectives. The work positions multi-agent systems as a promising direction for AI in the legal domain.
why_it_matters_zh: 该研究突破了以往法律AI主要依赖单一大型模型的局限，提出多智能体商议框架，借鉴法庭辩论机制，提升了处理复杂法律推理的能力。多智能体方法通过多角度协同，能够提供更丰富和多样的解答，支持更全面的司法分析，具有重要理论和实践价值。
why_it_matters_en: This research advances beyond traditional single-model approaches in legal AI by proposing multi-agent deliberation frameworks inspired by courtroom debate, enhancing the capacity for complex legal reasoning. Multi-agent methods enable collaborative, multi-perspective analysis, offering richer and more diverse answers that support comprehensive judicial assessment, holding significant theoretical and practical value.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: Investigating Multi-Agent Deliberation in Law. Category: research_papers. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.
ranking_reason: Selected from authoritative primary source; quality score 77.

title_zh: 从命题不对称到感知不对称：将摩擦策略优化扩展到非对称部分信息对话
title_en: From Propositional to Perceptual Asymmetry: Extending Frictive Policy Optimization to Asymmetric Partial Information Dialogue
summary_zh: 本文扩展了摩擦策略优化（FPO）方法，将其应用于感知不对称场景，即对话参与者持有非对称的部分信息，导致相同的指代表达在不同信息状态下产生不同的指称。通过跨语料库分析及大语言模型的探测，主要使用HCRC MapTask数据集，验证了FPO的摩擦功能性在各参与者信息范围内的有效性，同时指出少数模糊配置引发大量误解。LLM探测显示，正确视角比全知立场更关键。作者还提出了针对注释的两项改进建议。
summary_en: This work extends Frictive Policy Optimization (FPO) to handle perceptual asymmetry in dialogues where participants hold asymmetric partial information, causing identical referring expressions to have different meanings depending on the speaker's information state. Evaluations through cross-corpora analysis and LLM probing on referentially asymmetric dialogue tasks, mainly HCRC's MapTask, demonstrate that FPO's friction functional is only valid from within each participant’s information horizon. Ambiguous landmark configurations disproportionately cause misunderstandings despite seemingly successful dialogue trajectories. The LLM probe reveals that having the correct perspective matters more than omniscient access. Two annotation refinements are proposed: subtype decomposition of pending grounding states and accommodation-aware alignment classification.
why_it_matters_zh: 该研究突破了之前FPO仅考虑命题不对称的局限，覆盖了更复杂的感知不对称问题，增强了对现实对话中信息不对称和误解现象的理解与建模能力，对自然语言理解与对话系统发展具有重要意义。
why_it_matters_en: This research broadens prior FPO work from propositional to perceptual asymmetry, addressing asymmetric partial information scenarios more reflective of real dialogues. It improves understanding and modeling of misunderstandings arising from differing participant perspectives, which is vital for advancing natural language understanding and dialogue system robustness.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: From Propositional to Perceptual Asymmetry: Extending Frictive Policy Optimization to Asymmetric Partial Information Dialogue. Category: research_papers. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.
ranking_reason: Selected from authoritative primary source; quality score 69.

title_zh: 基于参考的语音系统韵律与节奏评估方法
title_en: Reference-Based Prosody and Rhythm Evaluation for Spoken Dialogue Systems
summary_zh: 本文提出了一种针对语音对话系统的韵律和节奏评估方法。利用超过4000小时的双人英语对话数据，构建了匹配的参考基准，涵盖基频均值、基频表现力、语速、发音率、停顿比例及平均停顿时长等指标。通过百分位数评价协议，将系统输出的指标与最接近的匹配人类参考进行比较，报告偏差和异常标记，提供可解释的行为合理性检测，补充传统感知和用户评价。
summary_en: The paper presents a reference-based evaluation method for prosody and rhythm in spoken dialogue systems. Using over 4000 hours of dyadic English conversation data, matched reference regimes for metrics such as F0 mean, F0 expressivity, speech rate, articulation rate, pause ratio, and mean pause duration are established. A percentile-based protocol compares system outputs to closest human references, reporting deviations and out-of-regime flags. This approach offers interpretable behavioral plausibility checks that complement, rather than replace, perceptual and user-centered evaluations.
why_it_matters_zh: 传统的韵律和节奏评价常因模型预测说话人特质和交互状态的不同而难以准确校准。本文方法通过匹配参考数据，降低误报率，使评价结果更具解释性和针对性，提升了语音系统评估的科学性和可靠性。
why_it_matters_en: Conventional prosody and rhythm evaluation faces challenges due to variability in speaker traits and interaction states predicted by models. This method employs matched reference data to reduce false flags, yielding more interpretable and targeted evaluation results, thereby enhancing the scientific rigor and reliability of speech system assessment.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: Reference-Based Prosody and Rhythm Evaluation for Spoken Dialogue Systems. Category: research_papers. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.
ranking_reason: Selected from authoritative primary source; quality score 67.

title_zh: 构建用于关键词提取的学术论文多模态数据集
title_en: Building a Multimodal Dataset of Academic Paper for Keyword Extraction
summary_zh: 通常，关键词提取任务仅依赖文本数据，忽视了图像和音频中的视觉及音频信息，导致信息丰富度不足，且忽略潜在关联，限制了模型表示学习和预测准确性。现有用于关键词提取的多模态数据集稀缺，阻碍了多模态关键词提取研究进展。该研究构建了包含1000个样本的学术论文多模态数据集，每个样本包含论文文本、图像、音频和关键词。通过无监督和有监督方法，利用论文文本、图像及音频提取的文本进行了关键词提取实验，探讨了不同模态信息及其融合对性能的影响。实验结果表明，不同模态文本在模型中表现出特征差异，论文文本、图像文本和音频文本的组合显著提升了关键词提取效果。
summary_en: Keyword extraction tasks have traditionally relied solely on textual data, neglecting rich visual and audio features from images and audio, which limits data representation learning and prediction accuracy. Scarce multimodal datasets have also hindered research progress. This study constructs a multimodal academic paper dataset with 1000 samples, each containing paper text, images, audio, and keywords. Experiments using unsupervised and supervised keyword extraction methods analyzed textual data from papers as well as text extracted from images and audio to investigate performance differences across modalities and their fusion. Results show distinct characteristics of text across modalities and that combining paper text, image text, and audio text effectively improves keyword extraction performance.
why_it_matters_zh: 该研究解决了关键词提取领域在多模态数据缺乏及信息利用不足的问题。通过构建丰富的多模态数据集和探究不同模态协同作用，提高了关键词提取的准确率，推动了多模态研究在学术文本处理中的应用和发展。
why_it_matters_en: This research addresses the scarcity of multimodal data and the underutilization of information in keyword extraction. By building a comprehensive multimodal dataset and exploring the synergy of different modalities, it enhances extraction accuracy and advances multimodal approaches in academic text processing.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: Building a Multimodal Dataset of Academic Paper for Keyword Extraction. Category: image_ai. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

summary_zh: 本文探讨了专业化在各种领域中的不可避免趋势，强调随着技术和知识的不断扩展，个体和组织通过专注于特定领域来提升效率和竞争力。
summary_en: The article discusses the inevitable trend of specialization across various fields, emphasizing that as technology and knowledge expand, individuals and organizations focus on specific domains to enhance efficiency and competitiveness.
why_it_matters_zh: 随着信息量和技术的爆炸性增长，单靠广泛的知识已难以应对复杂问题，专业化使得资源利用更加高效且成果更加专业化。
why_it_matters_en: Due to the explosive growth of information and technology, relying on broad knowledge alone is insufficient for complex problems; specialization allows for more efficient resource use and more professional outcomes.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: Why Specialization Is Inevitable. Category: tools_apps. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.
ranking_reason: Selected from tier A source; quality score 54.
